name: Couscous Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Tomatoes, seeded and cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dressing by combining 3/4 cup olive oil, 1/2 cup fresh lemon juice, 2 cloves minced garlic, 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, 1 teaspoon ground coriander, 1 teaspoon salt, and freshly ground black pepper in a bowl.
2. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
3. Toss the dressing with the cooked couscous, chopped green onions, tomato pieces, cucumber, garbanzo beans, and parsley.
4. Garnish with additional fresh parsley before serving.
